subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from God unto him who hath been guided by the light of God in the days when all have taken unto themselves the calf [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من الله الی الذی اهتدی بضیاء الله فی ایام التی کل اتخذوا العجل
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment
